task_completion.description: Navigate to the Insurance Companies section in FreeMED
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED interface should show the Insurance Companies module, list, or menu active in the Firefox browser.

task_completion.description: Open the form to add a new insurance company
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form titled 'Add Insurance Company', 'New Insurance Company', or similar should be visible on the screen.
The text 'Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts' should be visible in the Name or Company Name input field.
The address fields should contain '101 Huntington Avenue' (Address Line 1), 'Boston' (City), 'MA' (State), and '02199' (Zip Code).
The text '8002622583' (or formatted as '800-262-2583') should be visible in the Phone input field.

task_completion.description: Save the new insurance company record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the record was saved, or the newly added 'Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts' appearing in the list of insurance companies.

integrity.description: Agent used the Firefox web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Firefox browser UI being used, rather than terminal commands like curl or wget.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual FreeMED application
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar should show 'http://localhost/freemed/' and the FreeMED interface should be visible, not a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI to insert data directly into the database
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing MySQL/MariaDB commands or scripts being executed to insert the record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The insurance company to be added is 'Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts'. The address is 101 Huntington Avenue, Boston, MA 02199. The phone number is 8002622583.
